title: metathelypteris adscendens
intro: Metathelypteris adscendens, also known as the intermediate lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing the risk of certain diseases and promoting overall health and well-being. Metathelypteris adscendens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
